structures.name: Identity
structures.doc: Identity surface for a source-event actor.

structures.name: Reference
structures.doc: Reference surface for a source-event artifact pointer.

structures.name: SourceEvent
structures.doc: Open-future event report emitted by a configured source.

definitions.name: CostPolicy.neutral
definitions.doc: Neutral cost policy for receipt surfaces that should not bias bind cost.

definitions.name: CostPolicy.internalReview
definitions.doc: Default internal-review policy for provider compatibility shims.

definitions.name: actorKey
definitions.doc: Namespace an actor as scheme:name for policy matching.

definitions.name: isTrusted
definitions.doc: Check whether a cost policy trusts an actor by name or scheme-qualified key.

definitions.name: visibilityToken
definitions.doc: Render source-event visibility for invariant strings.

definitions.name: backendToken
definitions.doc: Render an open backend descriptor for invariant strings.

definitions.name: invariant
definitions.doc: Source-agnostic invariant string for lawful and unlawful source events.

definitions.name: legacyInvariant
definitions.doc: Compatibility invariant formatter for legacy provider modules.

definitions.name: legacyTargetInvariant
definitions.doc: Compatibility target invariant adapter for legacy provider modules.

definitions.name: cost
definitions.doc: Source-agnostic cost function parameterized by policy and visibility.

definitions.name: bind
definitions.doc: Bind a source event to a target through the source-agnostic policy surface.

definitions.name: legacyBind
definitions.doc: Compatibility bind helper for legacy provider modules.

documentation: ProvenanceSource is the open-future event surface for artifact lifecycle reports.
Observation changes the receipt surface, not the underlying law.
The backend and reference kinds deliberately carry strings instead of closed enums.
